initial_program:
% Determine grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- N = n_rows(N), R = 0..N-1.
col(C) :- M = n_cols(M), C = 0..M-1.
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Guess the two nonzero cells (order by row)
1 { R1, C1, V1, R2, C2, V2 : input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), R1 < R2, V1 != V2 } 1 :- true.

% Parity and bothodd/even tests
sameParity(V1,V2) :- (V1 - V2) \ 2 = 0.
bothEven(V1,V2) :- (V1 \ 2 = 0), (V2 \ 2 = 0).
bothOdd(V1,V2)  :- (V1 - 1) \ 2 = 0, (V2 - 1) \ 2 = 0.

% Orientation
colOrient :- sameParity(V1,V2).
rowOrient :- not sameParity(V1,V2).

orientCol :- colOrient.
orientRow :- rowOrient.

% Column orientation: period Pc
colPeriod(Pc) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), R1 < R2, V1 != V2, (R2 \ R1) \ 2 = 0, (V1 \ 2 = 0), (V2 \ 2 = 0), Pc = (R2 \ R1) \ 2.
colPeriod(Pc) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), R1 < R2, V1 != V2, (R2 \ R1) \ 2 = 0, (V1 - 1) \ 2 = 0, (V2 - 1) \ 2 = 0, Pc = (R2 \ R1).
colPeriod(Pc) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), R1 < R2, V1 != V2, (R2 \ R1) \ 2 != 0, Pc = (R2 \ R1).

% Offset for column orientation
offsetcol(Oc) :- colPeriod(Pc), Oc = Pc \ 2.

% Allowed cells for column orientation (used when orientCol true)
allowed(R,C,V1) :- orientCol, row(R), col(C), col(C1), (C - C1) \ colPeriod(Pc) = 0, Color = V1.
allowed(R,C,V2) :- orientCol, row(R), col(C), col(C1), (C - C1) \ colPeriod(Pc) = offsetcol(Oc), Color = V2.
allowed(R,C,0)  :- orientCol, row(R), col(C), col(C1), (C - C1) \ colPeriod(Pc) != 0, (C - C1) \ colPeriod(Pc) != offsetcol(Oc), Color = 0.

% Row orientation: period Pr
rowPeriod(Pr) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), R1 < R2, V1 != V2, (R2 \ R1) \ 2 != 0, Pr = (R2 \ R1).
rowPeriod(Pr) :- input(R1,C1,V1), input(R2,C2,V2), R1 < R2, V1 != V2, (R2 \ R1) \ 2 = 0, (V1 - 1) \ 2 = 0, (V2 - 1) \ 2 = 0, Pr = (R2 \ R1) + 1.

% Offset for row orientation
offsetrow(Orow) :- rowPeriod(Pr), Orow = Pr \ 2.

% Allowed cells for row orientation (used when orientRow true)
allowed(R,C,V2) :- orientRow, row(R), col(C), (R2 - R) \ rowPeriod(Pr) = 0, Color = V2.
allowed(R,C,V1) :- orientRow, row(R), col(C), (R2 - R) \ rowPeriod(Pr) = offsetrow(Orow), Color = V1.
allowed(R,C,0)  :- orientRow, row(R), col(C), (R2 - R) \ rowPeriod(Pr) != 0, (R2 - R) \ rowPeriod(Pr) != offsetrow(Orow), Color = 0.

% Exactly one colour per output cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Col) } 1 :- allowed(R,C,Color).

#show output/3.

</tool_call>

</tool_call>

</tool_call>
